neighborhoods.name: David Centro
neighborhoods.description: Second-largest city in Panama with major shopping, medical facilities, and the main hub for Chiriqui province
neighborhoods.character: Provincial capital, shopping and medical hub, practical

housing.predominantType: Houses and apartments near the commercial center

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of David. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Dolega
neighborhoods.description: Small town north of David with cooler elevation, farming community, and quiet residential life
neighborhoods.character: Small town, farming, cooler elevation, peaceful
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to David's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: David Sur
neighborhoods.description: Southern residential areas with newer affordable developments and local markets
neighborhoods.character: Affordable residential, new construction, local markets

housing.predominantType: New construction houses and affordable apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: San Juan / Vista Alegre
neighborhoods.description: Northern residential areas popular with expats who use David as a base for shopping and medical care

housing.predominantType: Modern houses and small gated developments

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
